items.title: General Assembly Information Notice
items.content:
Turkcell announces the agenda for its Ordinary General Assembly meeting to be held on May 15, 2025. The agenda includes financial statements, election of board members, profit distribution, and other standard items.

The announcement details the agenda items for Turkcell's upcoming Ordinary General Assembly. Key items include the review and approval of the 2024 financial statements, the election of board members, the determination of profit distribution, and amendments to the company's articles of association. Additionally, the agenda covers the approval of the independent audit firm selection and information on donations made during the year. The meeting will take place at Aydınevler Mahallesi, İnönü Caddesi, No:20/36, C Blok, Konferans Salonu, Küçükyalı Ofispark, 34854, Maltepe/İstanbul.
